meaning: n.一群,空军中队,骑兵中队v.把...编成中队
examples: The squadron flew on a reconnaissance mission.
A squadron of F-15 fighters is on its way home.
He was posted to Hong Kong as second-in-command of C Squadron.
The U.S. Army's 1st Squadron, 10th Cavalry, was dispatched Friday night to investigate the site.
Roy Shoffner, a Kentucky businessman, made finding the remains of the lost squadron a passion.
